name: wxcode/admin-onyx-crypto
title: Onyx Crypto Admin
description: Dark-mode digital-asset portfolio console — left rail nav, topbar with network/wallet switcher, 4 KPI cards, area price chart, holdings table, and market movers side list. Sleek neon aesthetic with emerald and violet accents.

query.en: Build me a dark-mode crypto portfolio admin console — left rail nav, topbar with network and wallet switcher, 4 KPI cards, area price chart with timeframe tabs, holdings table with colored deltas, and a market movers side panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark-mode crypto portfolio admin console — left rail nav, topbar with network and wallet switcher, 4 KPI cards, area price chart with timeframe tabs, holdings table with colored deltas, and a market movers side panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
